title: Verification, binary smoke, JSON schema invariance

unit_tests_commands_remaining_vuln_tests.comment: 9 pre-existing + 2 new (test_vulnargs_run_default_suppresses_panic, test_vulnargs_run_include_smells_emits_panic). All test_analyze_rust_* (6) STAY GREEN unchanged — confirms gate is at VulnArgs::run filter layer, NOT inside analyze_rust_file.

vuln_migration_v1_red.comment: 168/168 GREEN preserved. Closes ZERO RED tests (this is a hardening milestone). The Bucket B / Ruby carry-forward note in the plan is stale — current HEAD shows 168/168 GREEN, no remaining RED.

json_schema_invariance.method: Compare top-level report keys + VulnFinding keys across both flag values
json_schema_invariance.verdict: JSON schema unchanged across flag values; only finding counts differ

magnitude_check.note: EMPIRICAL-MAGNITUDE per plan §5 R10 — the synthetic fixture confirms count delta of 1 Panic finding suppressed by default. Workspace-corpus smoke not run here because the synthetic fixture is sufficient to verify the gate semantics; the magnitude on production codebases is the user-visible UX win this milestone delivers (not a stop-threshold).
